_meta.description: National Curricular Framework (NCF) recommended teaching-period norms, adapted for Aruvi. Intended as the DEFAULT baseline Aruvi suggests when allocating periods across chapters via a subject's effort index — a teacher's actual allocation can still diverge from this.
_meta.unit: 40-minute periods, per subject per stage, per academic year
_meta.source_file: NCF_adapted_for_Aruvi.xlsx (uploaded by the founder 2026-07-01; kept alongside this JSON as the original provenance artifact)
_meta.stages: preparatory = grades III-V, middle = grades VI-VIII, secondary = grades IX-X (aruvi_core.grades.stage_for)
_meta.note_on_languages: The allocation for all three languages (in the three-language formula) in the middle and secondary stages have been averaged for allocation due to uncertainty around the three-language formula. English's middle/secondary figures below are that averaged figure, not an English-only NCF number.
